claims.text: 1. A sustained release pharmaceutical composition for once a day oral administration comprising about 20% to about 50% by weight of trazodone or a derivative thereof, about 20% to about 50% by weight ...
18. A method of treating a sleeping disorder comprising administering to a person with the sleeping disorder a sustained release pharmaceutical composition of claim 1 .

indications.text:
Oleptro™ is indicated for the treatment of major depressive disorder (MDD) in adults. The efficacy of
Oleptro has been established in a trial of outpatients with MDD as well as in trials with the immediate
release formulation of trazodone [see Clinical Studies (14)].
